lines.speaker: TzHaar-Ket-Rak
lines.text: JalYt-[caste]-Xo-[player name]. The challenge awaits, if you're brave enough.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Of course I'm brave enough.

lines.speaker: TzHaar-Ket-Rak
lines.text: Then select your challenge, JalYt-[caste]-Xo-[player name].

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll pass.

lines.speaker: TzHaar-Ket-Rak
lines.text: Few can match TzHaar bravery.

lines.speaker: TzHaar-Ket-Rak
lines.text: JalYt-[caste]-Kal-[player name]. Few match your strength. Do you wish to take on the challenge again?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Let's do it.

lines.speaker: TzHaar-Ket-Rak
lines.text: Then select your challenge, JalYt-[caste]-Kal-[player name].

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll pass.

lines.speaker: TzHaar-Ket-Rak
lines.text: The challenge is now beneath you? So be it.

lines.speaker: TzHaar-Ket-Rak
lines.text: JalYt-[caste]-Xo-[player name].

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Nice chair.

lines.speaker: TzHaar-Ket-Rak
lines.text: The finest obsidian. Cost many TokKul.

lines.speaker: TzHaar-Ket-Rak
lines.text: Now, have you come for the challenge?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Err, what challenge?

lines.speaker: TzHaar-Ket-Rak
lines.text: Deep in inferno, many offspring of TzTok-Jad. More powerful though. More dangerous.

lines.speaker: TzHaar-Ket-Rak
lines.text: The offspring need dealing with. A challenge for you perhaps, if you're brave enough.

sections.title: Dying or using the cave exit during a challenge

lines.speaker: TzHaar-Ket-Rak
lines.text: Failure. Maybe the challenge is not for you.

lines.speaker: TzHaar-Ket-Rak
lines.text: Challenge complete. Have some TokKul. Now, a new challenge awaits.

sections.title: Completing the sixth challenge for the first time

lines.speaker: TzHaar-Ket-Rak
lines.text: Six challenges complete. Very impressive JalYt. Have some TokKul, and a little extra something.

sections.title: Completing the sixth challenge subsequent times

lines.speaker: TzHaar-Ket-Rak
lines.text: Challenge complete. Have some TokKul.

sections.title: Completing the League-only challenge for the first time

lines.speaker: TzHaar-Ket-Rak
lines.text: All challenges complete. Very impressive JalYt. Have some TokKul, and a little extra something.

sections.title: Attempting to enter a challenge without having cleared the previous one
Attempting to enter the third challenge without having completed the Inferno
